title: Rate Limiting
excerpt: description: Define rate limits and interact with them directly from your Cloudflare Worker image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. The Rate Limiting API lets you define rate limits and write code around them in your Worker. * Rate limits that are applied after your Worker starts, only once a specific part of your code is reached
